name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: One-time Pathmark terms acceptance
release_notes: Removes the repeated pre-Google Pathmark Terms & Privacy gate. Google login now goes directly to Google's consent screen, and Pathmark asks for its own Terms and Privacy acceptance only once per terms version after sign-in.
notes: Google login buttons now launch the Google OAuth flow directly rather than first forcing a Pathmark terms screen.
Pathmark's public Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Google access explanation remain available for Google OAuth and user review.
After Google sign-in, Pathmark asks for a one-time Terms and Privacy confirmation for the current Pathmark terms version.
Accepted terms version is stored in the browser session and, when Pathmark Sync is available, in the settings sheet so the user is not asked every session.
The confirmation can be shown again in future only if the terms version changes or the saved acceptance cannot be found.
